name: Freelance Web Development
description: Build websites and web apps for local businesses, startups, and e-commerce brands. Platforms like Upwork and Toptal connect you with clients seeking React, WordPress, and Shopify expertise.

name: Freelance Copywriting
description: Write blog posts, sales pages, and email sequences for SaaS companies and e-commerce brands. Strong writers consistently earn $0.10–$0.25 per word on platforms like ClearVoice and Contently.

name: Rideshare Driving
description: Drive with Uber or Lyft using your existing vehicle. Airport runs and peak evening hours maximize your hourly rate. Most drivers clear $18–$25/hr after expenses with strategic scheduling.

name: High-Yield Savings Account
description: Park your emergency fund in a HYSA earning 4.5–5.0% APY instead of a traditional savings account at 0.5%. Requires no time investment — just an account opening. Every extra dollar earning more is money working for your debt payoff.
skills: None — open an account online in 10 minutes

name: Online Tutoring
description: Tutor K–12 students or college learners in math, science, or test prep via Wyzant, Tutor.com, or Varsity Tutors. Specialized subjects like SAT math or AP Chemistry command $40–$100/hr.

name: Print-on-Demand Store
description: Design and sell custom t-shirts, mugs, and phone cases through Printful + Etsy or Shopify. Orders are printed and shipped automatically — no inventory, no upfront product cost.

name: Dividend Stock Investing
description: Build a dividend portfolio targeting 3–6% annual yield with blue-chip stocks and ETFs like SCHD or VYM. Reinvest dividends to compound returns. Every $10k invested generates $300–$600/year passively.

name: Airbnb / Short-Term Rental
description: List a spare room, vacation home, or rental property on Airbnb. Hosts in desirable locations earn $1,000–$5,000/month per listing after platform fees. Professional photography and fast responses dramatically increase bookings.

name: Social Media Management
description: Manage Instagram, LinkedIn, or TikTok accounts for small businesses that know they need a social presence but don't have time. Package deals of $500–$2,000/month per client make this highly scalable as a solo operator.

name: Food & Grocery Delivery
description: Deliver for DoorDash, Instacart, or Amazon Flex on your own schedule. Optimize for lunch/dinner rushes and multi-app to maximize active earnings. Average $15–$22/hr after expenses in most metro areas.

name: YouTube Channel
description: Build a channel around personal finance, cooking, fitness, or any niche you know deeply. AdSense + brand sponsorships + affiliate links create multiple compounding revenue streams. Takes 6–18 months to monetize — but the ceiling is limitless.

name: Virtual Assistant
description: Provide remote administrative support — inbox management, scheduling, research, and data entry — to busy entrepreneurs, executives, and real estate investors. High demand, flexible hours, and no commute.
